working_on: Resolve Issue #106 — clarify ADR 0065 commitment 1 'no web app' scope (consumer product distribution channel only; marketing/graph-viz surfaces not foreclosed); cascade to ADR 0072/0073 + paideia-frontend-overlays skill + STATE.md.
outcome_summary: Issue #106 closed: ADR 0065 commitment 1 gains an inline scope clarification — 'no web app' applies to the consumer learner-facing product distribution channel only; marketing-site + knowledge-graph-visualizer + OSS-demo web surfaces are operational not product and not foreclosed (funnel-mechanic discipline per commitment 6 still binds them). Edit target reframed from the superseded ADR 0035 to the live ADR 0065 (Explore-agent catch at planning). User adjudicated Option A (inline clarification, no ### Amendment header per ADR 0062; ADR 0065 stays Accepted) over B (supersede) and C (refuse). Cascade per ADR 0041: ADR 0072 + ADR 0073 + paideia-frontend-overlays skill + STATE.md retargeted to the resolved ADR 0065 commitment 1; stale ADR 0035 citations fixed. No ADR authored, no code authored. validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 45 checks, baseline soft-warns only, no new soft-warns. 1 MemPalace decision drawer (drawer_paideia_decisions_4f913e328fc1b05408300bab). Backlog 14 → 13.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — the approved Option A plan delivered in full: ADR 0065 commitment 1 inline scope clarification, the 4-surface cascade (ADR 0072, ADR 0073, paideia-frontend-overlays SKILL.md, STATE.md), ENGINE_LOG entry, MemPalace decision drawer, and Issue #106 close. No descope, reorder, or deferral. In-context cleanup: stale ADR 0035 citations in the cascade files (superseded since S-0128) were retargeted to ADR 0065 — within the spirit of the cascade, not a scope expansion.
